description: Style noteA refined interpretation of the classic penny loafer, this four-hole lace up suede shoe from woodland also references the conservative derby in its styling. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Upper Leather upper with strategically placed overlays Stitches on the seams of the toe box Four-hole lace ups Padded tongue Padded insole for in-step comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel Midsole Lightweight Rubber midsole Outsole Dual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heel Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
